description_long: This is a large, slightly deformed cardboard box with visible creases, dents, and some scuff marks on its surface, suggesting it has been handled or transported. The box is open at the top, with two flaps partially folded inward, revealing a hollow interior. The exterior is a light brown color typical of corrugated cardboard, with subtle vertical lines indicating the grain of the material. The box's corners are slightly rounded and the edges are not perfectly straight, adding to its worn appearance. There are no visible labels, tape, or markings aside from the wear and tear. The object is commonly found in urban environments as a shipping or storage parcel.
description: A large, worn, light brown cardboard box with an open top and visible creases and scuff marks.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open top with two flaps partially folded inward and visible scuff marks on the front face.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the box's slightly deformed shape and the absence of visible flaps, with more pronounced creases.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mostly intact, closed surface with subtle vertical lines and minor wear.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the box's top and one side, emphasizing the light brown color and some surface imperfections.
